heading: Limitation on number and kind of employment
label: 58 Limitation on number and kind of employment
text: The number and kind of employees at each agency shall be prescribed by the Secretary of the Interior and none other shall be employed.
notes: Salary Restrictions, , as amended by , , excluded the Osage Agency from the provisions of act , limiting the amount of money to be expended for salaries of regular employees at any one agency.Act Apr. 18, 1912, ch. 83, § 1037 Stat. 88act May 25, 1918, ch. 86, § 1740 Stat. 578June 7, 1897, , which repealed a provision of , , imposing a salary limitation of $15,000 at any one agency and $20,000 at a consolidated agency, was itself repealed by , , .Act Feb. 26, 1929, ch. 32345 Stat. 1307act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 388, § 137 Stat. 521Pub.
